text:
Once upon a time, in a little town somewhere in the dense forestlands of England, there lived a little girl named Olive. Olive had the most incredible imagination, and every day was like a treasure hunt for her mind.

She would spend her days peeking through the trees just beyond the clearing where there was a little stream that flowed into the big river nearby. In her bookshelf-lined bedroom, Olive would curl up with a good book, and before she knew it, she was lost in the world she had conjured from the pages.

One morning, while the sun was poking through the trees just the way Olive liked her forests of green and wildflowers, she noticed something odd. Down near the stream, there was a small old woodpecker nest tucked away in an old oak tree. The woodpecker's nestlings were chirping away, and Olive couldn't help but sing along, imagining herself as the little woodpecker expert of the neighborhood.

But something else caught her eye
